name: mixpanel-analytics-mcp

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const f = 'build/index.js'; const c = fs.readFileSync(f, 'utf8'); if (!c.startsWith('#!')) fs.writeFileSync(f, '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + c); fs.chmodSync(f, '755');"

author: Andrea Mario Lufino <andrea@andrealufino.com>
description: Mixpanel Analytics MCP - Query Mixpanel analytics through Claude via Model Context Protocol
